U.S. SLED · Engagement examples

Delivered subcontractor engagements.

Technical work completed for U.S. prime contractors under subcontract and NDA. Engagements summarized at the engagement-type level; partner names withheld unless we have explicit written permission to publish them.

Operating boundaries Subcontract-only NDA on first contact Zero agency-facing engagements
Delivered engagements

What we shipped, under whose roof, on what vehicle.

Each card describes a delivered subcontract engagement: the technical surface area, the prime relationship type, the deliverables that shipped, and the procurement vehicle the work moved through. References available with NDA.

Delivered Anonymized · NDA

GIS facility inventory & forecast model for a state environmental plan

GIS & DataEnvironmentalStatutory submission
Engagement Subcontracted technical workstream for the GIS, data-pipeline, and statutory-document portions of a county-level Materials Management Plan adopted under a state environmental framework.
Prime National environmental consulting firm holding the master contract with the county.
Shipped Facility-level inventory pipeline (PostGIS + GeoPandas), 20-year capacity forecast model, statutory document production package, EGLE-format-validated submission.
Outcome Submitted on the prime's schedule, zero format deficiencies on first submission, adopted at scheduled hearing.
Vehicle · Direct subcontract under prime's master agreement
Delivered Anonymized · NDA

Accessibility remediation engineering for a statewide service portal

WCAG 2.2 AAEngineeringPortal modernization
Engagement Engineering workstream covering remediation of an existing constituent service portal against WCAG 2.2 AA, including component-library refactor, PDF/UA tooling, and automated regression suite.
Prime Mid-size systems integrator holding the modernization contract with the state agency.
Shipped Accessible component library, screen-reader test harness (NVDA / VoiceOver), PDF/UA conversion pipeline, plain-language editing of 1,200+ pages of statutory content.
Outcome All P0/P1 axe-detected findings closed; passed third-party manual audit on first run.
Vehicle · State Master Agreement, prime-held
Delivered Anonymized · NDA

Permitting platform integration & data migration

Platform modernizationIntegrationData migration
Engagement Integration and data-migration workstream for a state permitting platform modernization. Wrapped a legacy mainframe with a service layer; migrated 14 years of permit records into the new platform.
Prime Tier-1 systems integrator delivering the platform under a multi-year contract.
Shipped REST service layer over legacy mainframe, ETL pipeline (Airbyte + dbt) for record migration, audit trail and reconciliation reporting, IV&V response packages.
Outcome Phase 2 cutover hit milestone date; reconciliation reports closed with zero unexplained variance.
Vehicle · NASPO ValuePoint, via prime
Delivered Anonymized · NDA

Multilingual public engagement platform for a regional plan

Public engagementMultilingualRegional plan
Engagement Public-facing engagement platform supporting a 35-municipality regional plan: comment capture, multilingual surveys, hearing presentation packs, and disadvantaged-community outreach instrumentation.
Prime Regional planning consultancy under contract to the lead municipality.
Shipped Custom survey platform with full i18n stack (English, Spanish, Arabic), comment intake and triage workflow, hearing-pack generator, equity dashboard.
Outcome All 35 municipalities covered in the per-meeting briefing pack; statutory comment-period requirements met across every jurisdiction.
Vehicle · Direct subcontract under prime's master agreement
Delivered Anonymized · NDA

Grant-reporting automation for a federal-state pass-through

GrantsAutomationFederal-state
Engagement Reporting automation workstream covering quarterly milestone reporting and federal-state reconciliation for a multi-year pass-through grant program serving tribal and rural districts.
Prime Regional consultancy holding the program-management contract for the grant administrator.
Shipped Reporting pipeline (n8n + custom Python), reconciliation engine against project delivery data, federal-format report generators, deadline alerting and audit trail.
Outcome Zero late quarterly filings across the engagement period; audit-trail artifacts accepted by federal program officer without follow-up.
Vehicle · Direct subcontract under prime's master agreement
Delivered Anonymized · NDA

Compliance & adoption-sequence tracking for a multi-county program

ComplianceDashboardingAudit trail
Engagement Operational dashboarding and audit-trail workstream tracking statutory comment periods, public hearings, board adoptions, and submission deadlines across a multi-county program.
Prime Environmental consulting prime delivering the multi-county program-management contract.
Shipped Adoption-sequence tracker (PostgreSQL + Metabase), deadline alerting service, statute-citation validation engine, immutable records export for FOIA requests.
Outcome All counties adopted on schedule; FOIA-ready records export delivered to the prime within 24 hours of request.
Vehicle · Direct subcontract under prime's master agreement
What we cannot show publicly

Most of our SLED work stays under NDA.

The engagements above are summarized at the technical-deliverable level. Specifics live on a separate call, behind a mutual NDA, with the prime in the room.

✕

RFP numbers and agency names are withheld unless we have explicit written permission from the prime to publish them.

✕

Proposal content, evaluation matrices, and scoring breakdowns are never republished in public form. Those belong to the prime and the procuring agency.

✕

Analyses of active solicitations are not published. We analyze RFPs only against a formally scoped engagement with a prime, under NDA, against a defined deliverable.

✕

Reference conversations with the named prime contractor on any of these engagements are available on request, with an NDA in place and the prime's consent.

Capture manager or BD lead at a U.S. prime?

Request a reference conversation.

NDA-first introduction. We'll route you to the right named reference for the engagement type closest to your pursuit.

Start an NDA conversation
